data.title: US-China Tensions Disrupt Academic Ties, Leave Chinese Students Facing Visa Cancellations, Political Pressure
data.description: US-China tensions affect universities as Chinese students caught in crossfire. Visa revocations and surveillance trigger confusion and fear.

data.title: SPY, QQQ Call Volumes Spiked Minutes Before Tariff Pause Announcement: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez Demands Disclosure From Congress Members
data.description: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez has called for a disclosure by Congress members after noting that call volumes spiked minutes before tariff pause.

data.description: President Donald Trump indicated a more lenient approach to his trade agenda on Wednesday, leading to a significant rally in the stock market, but portfolio managers and analysts aren't fully convinced.

data.title: Jack Dorsey's Block Is Making It Easy For Companies To Manage Their Bitcoin Treasury—Here's How
data.description: Fintech firm Block, Inc. (NYSE:XYZ) launched a new dashboard Wednesday to help companies effectively manage their Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) holdings.
